rows.label: qev041407_MSG0001
rows.name:
Did you need something, mo? If
it is about the Dodonga Caravan,
please ask Kaka anything, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the request received from Ngogo.

rows.label: qev041407_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what this caravan does for a living.

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0002
rows.name:
We make and sell pollen orbs
using various pollens gathered
in the Nightglow Forest, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0003
rows.name:
Pollen orbs are a classic Nopon snack,
mo. Ours in particular have a reputation
for being delicious, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0008
rows.name:
The Dodonga Caravan will gather
all its strength to launch an
amazing firework, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Here, this is the contract,
mo. Please take care of it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0010
rows.name: Please leave the fireworks to me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041407_MSG0011
rows.name:
We will show you a spectacular firework
that will wake up that timid Elder, mo![ST:wait ]
